---
title: "Paris Palooza"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r packages, include=FALSE}
rm(list = ls()) 
pkgs.load <- c("dplyr", "readxl", "leaflet", "stringr", "tidyr", "tidyverse", "RColorBrewer")
lapply(pkgs.load, require, character.only = TRUE)
```

```{r data, include=FALSE}
Paris <- read_excel("Paris.xlsx")
```

```{r processing, include=FALSE}
# Coordinate Extraction
Paris$lng_val <- as.numeric(gsub(",", "", str_extract(Paris$coordinates, ",.*")))
Paris$lat_val <- as.numeric(gsub(",", "", str_extract(Paris$coordinates, "^.*,")))

# Caption Cleaning
Paris <- Paris %>%
  mutate(
    caption = paste(replace_na(name, ""), replace_na(note, ""), replace_na(initials, ""), sep = " | "),
    caption = str_replace_all(caption, "NA", ""),
    caption = str_replace_all(caption, " \\|  \\| ", " | "),
    caption = str_trim(str_replace(caption, "^\\| | \\|$", ""))
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(lat_val), !is.na(lng_val))

categories <- sort(unique(Paris$category))
```

```{r leaflet_map, echo=FALSE, out.width = "100%", out.height = "700px"}
# 1. Expanded Palette
color_count <- length(categories)
get_palette <- colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(9, "Set1"))
custom_pal <- colorFactor(palette = get_palette(color_count), domain = categories)

# 2. Build Base Map
m <- leaflet(data = Paris) %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$OpenStreetMap)

# 3. Add Loop for Groups
for(cat in categories) {
  df_sub <- Paris %>% filter(category == cat)
  m <- m %>% addCircleMarkers(
    data = df_sub,
    lat = ~lat_val,
    lng = ~lng_val,
    color = ~custom_pal(category),
    opacity = 1,
    fillOpacity = 0.8,
    radius = 8,
    popup = ~caption,
    group = cat 
  )
}

# 4. Separate the Controls to prevent overlap
m <- m %>%
  addLayersControl(
    overlayGroups = categories,
    # 'collapsed = TRUE' makes it a small icon until clicked
    options = layersControlOptions(collapsed = TRUE), 
    position = "topright" 
  ) %>%
  addLegend(
    pal = custom_pal, 
    values = categories, 
    title = "Category", 
    position = "topleft" # Moved to bottomleft to stay clear of the toggle
  )

m
```


```{r tail, include=FALSE}

lastRevised <- timestamp(prefix = "last revised: ", suffix = "")
file.copy("ParisMapping.html","index.html",overwrite = TRUE)

```

<center>
<small>`r lastRevised`</small>
</center>
<br />
